tasks.label: Docker Compose Up
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties; docker compose up --build -d; docker compose ps

tasks.label: shadcn init pipe
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties\frontend; echo 'y' | npx shadcn@latest init --preset aJyjTda --yes --force 2>&1

tasks.label: shadcn init v2
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties\frontend; echo 'y' | npx shadcn@latest init --preset aJyjTda --yes --force 2>&1

tasks.label: shadcn add extras
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties\frontend; npx shadcn@latest add label separator alert --overwrite --yes 2>&1

tasks.label: shadcn add sheet scroll-area tooltip badge
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command 'cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties\frontend; npx shadcn@latest add sheet scroll-area tooltip badge --overwrite --yes 2>&1'

tasks.label: Check Docker Status
tasks.command: docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}	{{.Status}}	{{.Ports}}" && echo --- && docker logs royalties-backend-1 --tail 5

tasks.label: Test Chat Stream
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"messages\":[{\"role\":\"user\",\"parts\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"Say hello in markdown with a bullet list\"}]}]}" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 15

tasks.label: Force rebuild backend
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties; docker compose build --no-cache backend 2>&1; docker compose up -d backend 2>&1

tasks.label: Test DMR & Build Backend
args: Write-Output '=== Testing Docker Model Runner ==='; docker exec royalties-backend-1 python -c "import httpx; r=httpx.get('http://model-runner.docker.internal/engines/llama.cpp/v1/models', timeout=5); print('STATUS:', r.status_code); print('BODY:', r.text[:300])" 2>&1; Write-Output '=== Done ==='

tasks.label: Test DMR Inside Container
args: docker cp C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\test_dmr_inside.py royalties-backend-1:/tmp/test_dmr.py; docker exec royalties-backend-1 python /tmp/test_dmr.py 2>&1

tasks.label: Rebuild Backend
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties; docker compose up --build -d backend 2>&1; Write-Output '=== DONE ==='

tasks.label: Rebuild Backend
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties; docker compose up --build -d backend 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; Write-Output '---DONE---'

tasks.label: Docker Full Rebuild
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator\royalties; docker compose build --no-cache frontend 2>&1; Write-Host 'FRONTEND_BUILD_DONE'; docker compose up -d 2>&1; Write-Host 'ALL_UP'; docker compose ps 2>&1

tasks.label: Git Commit and Push
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator; git add -A 2>&1; git commit -m 'feat: PDF iframe preview, chat persistence, actions dropdown, scroll fix, chat format cleanup' 2>&1; git push origin main 2>&1; Write-Host 'GIT_TASK_COMPLETE'

tasks.label: Git Status Check
args: cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator; git log --oneline -5 2>&1; Write-Host '---'; git status --porcelain 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Host '---STATUS_DONE---'

tasks.label: Git: Stage Amend Push
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator; git add -A 2>&1; Write-Host '=== FILES STAGED ==='; git status --short 2>&1; Write-Host '=== AMENDING COMMIT ==='; git commit --amend -m 'feat: PDF iframe preview, chat persistence, actions dropdown, scroll fix, chat format cleanup' 2>&1; Write-Host '=== PUSHING ==='; git push origin main 2>&1; Write-Host '=== ALL DONE ==='"

tasks.label: Git: Check State
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd C:\Users\ei\Projects\royaltyStatementValidator; git log --oneline -3 2>&1; Write-Host '---'; git status --short 2>&1; Write-Host '---'; git remote show origin 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'main'; Write-Host '=== CHECK DONE ==='"
